title: Ubiquiti Device Bridge Pro Sector
description: Device Bridge Pro Sector is a PTMP WiFi 5 access point from the UniFi device family. It operates in the 5 GHz band with a maximum modulation rate of 400 Mbps. The unit features a 90° sector antenna with a gain of 17 dBi and can connect up to 40+ client devices. A Gigabit Ethernet port is used for network connectivity and supports PoE input with a voltage range of 42.5â57 V DC. The device has a maximum power consumption of 6 W 5 GHz WiFi 5 up to 400 Mbps 90° sector antenna Supports 40+ client devices Managed via UniFi Network Device Mounting bracket Metal clamp
